description: A refactor that quietly absorbs behavior changes and unrelated cleanups, making the diff unreviewable and regressions hard to isolate.
body: Failure mode: what started as a structural refactor accumulates bug fixes, renames, and behavior tweaks in one commit, so reviewers cannot tell mechanical from behavioral changes and a later regression cannot be bisected to a clear cause. Detection signals: a large diff mixing logic and structure; review comments confused about intent; bisect lands on a commit doing many things. Do not bundle behavior changes into a structural refactor. Safer fallback: split the change into a pure structural step and separate behavioral commits, keep each green, and get the mechanical part reviewed on its own.
